ddt:Target.Name: N_P33A_BMS_12V_UDS_VC_20201016
ddt:Target.Description:
[8]Oct 16th, 2020 nissan XX6 Solved DB checker's error based on V1.10.
[7]Dec 24th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Added some Identification request and more, based on Rev5.
[6]Nov 29th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Modified DM/FFD/Config data, based on Rev4.
[5]Oct 2nd, 2019 Nissan XX6 Modified Config items $01F0, $01F2, $01F4 and $01F5.
[4]Sep 25th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Added Item: Failures.
[3]Aug 6th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Modified CANID.
[2]Jun 20th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Modified Item: DM, WS, AT.
[1]Nov 5th, 2018 Nissan XX6 Add item: AT(1 item)
[N] 2018/10/18 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Initial Creation.

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: (TBD)activate in wake up mode of the BMS only(00h)
(TBD)Activate in wake up and/or sleep mode of the BMS(80h)
(TBD)Open the relay when the BMS receive frame crash(00h)
(TBD)Close the relay when the BMS receive frame crash(40h)
(TBD) keep the switch in the same state(80h)

Data.Name: DataRead.FFD_$EF01_#007_bit0_(DEV) Primary Pack Voltage Measurement OOR Fault
DataRead.FFD_$EF01_#008_bit7_(DEV) Primary Pack Voltage Measurement Stuck Fault
DataRead.FFD_$EF01_#008_bit6_(DEV) Secondary Pack Voltage Measurement OOR Fault
DataRead.FFD_$EF01_#008_bit5_(DEV) Secondary Pack Voltage Measurement Stuck Fault
DataRead.FFD_$EF01_#008_bit3_(DEV) Primary Bus Voltage Measurement OOR Fault
DataRead.FFD_$EF01_#008_bit2_(DEV) Primary Bus Voltage Measurement Stuck Fault
DataRead.FFD_$EF01_#008_bit1_(DEV) Secondary Bus Voltage Measurement OOR Fault
DataRead.FFD_$EF01_#008_bit0_(DEV) Secondary Bus Voltage Measurement Stuck Fault
DataRead.FFD_$EF01_#009_bit6_(DEV) Current Integration and SOC Rationality Fault
DataRead.FFD_$EF01_#009_bit2_(DEV) High Discharge Current in Low Power Mode
DataRead.FFD_$EF01_#010_bit0_(DEV) Over Voltage Test not executing
DataRead.FFD_$EF01_#011_bit6_(DEV) Temperature Measurements not in Range
DataRead.FFD_$EF01_#012_bit5_(DEV) Cellsum to Pack Voltages Rationality Fault
DataRead.FFD_$EF01_#012_bit4_(DEV) Cell Voltages In Range Rationality Fault
DataRead.FFD_$EF01_#012_bit3_(DEV) Cell Voltages Measurement OOR Fault
DataRead.FFD_$EF01_#013_bit7_(DEV) Cell Voltages High Longer Duration Fault
DataRead.FFD_$EF01_#013_bit6_(DEV) Cell Voltage Medium Limit Fault
DataRead.FFD_$EF01_#013_bit5_(DEV) Cell Voltages Above Nominal Fault

DataItem.Name: DataRead.FFD_$EF01_#007_bit0_(DEV) Primary Pack Voltage Measurement OOR Fault
DataRead.FFD_$EF01_#008_bit7_(DEV) Primary Pack Voltage Measurement Stuck Fault
DataRead.FFD_$EF01_#008_bit6_(DEV) Secondary Pack Voltage Measurement OOR Fault
